title: Garuda
overview: In Bangkok, construction workers come across a rock which cannot be drilled, and discover dinosaur-like fossils of a creature resembling the Garuda from Thai-Hindu mythology. Two American archeologists investigate, awakening the creature which then goes on a rampage.

trailers.title: Garuda (2004) - trailer
trailers.channel_name: Portal Arlequin: cine fantastico y de culto
